prompt_config.style: Impressionist realism with autochrome photography texture

main_prompt: A captivating square composition of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 1:1 format, centered on the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown at summit with gradient), Belle Époque crowd in period-accurate fashion on bustling cobblestone streets, Haussmannian buildings with cream limestone and grey-blue zinc roofs framing the scene, volumetric lighting with warm gaslight contrasting cold electric arc lights, morning fog, steam and coal smoke atmosphere, impressionist realism style with photographic grain and slight vignetting

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 format requires focused composition, vertical emphasis to include full Eiffel Tower or closer street-level scene with Tower in background
framing_suggestions: Option 1: Vertical slice showing Eiffel Tower from base to top with foreground crowd and street activity
Option 2: Street-level scene with Tower visible in upper background, focus on Belle Époque crowd and architecture
Option 3: Close-up of Galerie des Machines entrance with elegantly dressed visitors, Tower visible in distance

architecture.eiffel_tower: Newly built Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark red-brown color), gradient paint from dark at top to lighter at base, raw industrial modernity symbol, iron lattice structure clearly visible, positioned as central or background focal point
architecture.galerie_des_machines: Massive industrial cathedral, blue-grey steel framework, enormous glass vault, largest arched building of the era, imposing architectural presence
architecture.haussmannian_buildings: Cream-colored limestone buildings, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, ornate wrought-iron balconies, classic Parisian architecture framing the square composition
architecture.street_furniture: Luisant cobblestones, green Morris columns with colorful posters, newspaper kiosks, gas street lamps, period-accurate urban details

fashion_1889.women: Ladies in Belle Époque S-silhouette dresses, tightly corseted waists, long flowing skirts without large bustles, lace parasols, elaborate hats adorned with feathers and flowers, long gloves, elegant posture
fashion_1889.men: Gentlemen in dark three-piece suits and frock coats, obligatory hats (top hats for bourgeoisie, bowler hats or caps for workers), handlebar mustaches or full beards, formal Victorian gentleman style
fashion_1889.crowd: Mixed social classes, well-dressed bourgeoisie visiting the Exposition, workers in rough vests and work blouses, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy, crowd positioned in foreground or mid-ground for Instagram engagement

color_palette.color_description: Muted historical palette, sepia, grey zinc, stone beige, Rouge Venise brick red, bottle green, Instagram-friendly yet historically accurate
color_palette.instagram_appeal: Rich vintage tones that stand out in Instagram feeds, nostalgic aesthetic

visual_texture.film_grain: Light photographic grain simulating old film stock
visual_texture.vignetting: Subtle vignette effect on edges, enhanced for square format
visual_texture.finish: Autochrome photography aesthetic with slightly grainy pastel tones, impressionist realism à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud

lighting_atmosphere.gaslight: Warm yellow flickering gaslight illuminating streets, soft golden glow, traditional lighting
lighting_atmosphere.electric_light: Cold blue-white electric arc lamps at the Exposition Universelle, harsh modern illumination, technological contrast
lighting_atmosphere.natural_light: Foggy morning light, atmospheric haze, volumetric lighting through steam and coal smoke
lighting_atmosphere.atmospheric_effects: Steam vapor, coal smoke from trains and factories in background, mist over the Seine river, industrial revolution atmosphere
lighting_atmosphere.instagram_lighting: Balanced exposure for mobile viewing, dramatic but not too dark

negative_prompt: modern clothing, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, neon signs, plastic materials, digital aesthetic, oversaturated colors, bronze Eiffel Tower, wrong historical period, Victorian England fashion, crinolines, large bustles, anachronistic elements, modern photography style, clean air, 21st century elements, horizontal composition, wide panorama, stretched composition

recommended_settings.detail_level: high for architecture and fashion details

complete_prompt_string: Square composition of Paris 1889 during Exposition Universelle, 1:1 format, featuring the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise red-brown with gradient as central focal point, Haussmannian limestone buildings with zinc roofs and wrought-iron balconies framing the scene, bustling cobblestone street with reflections, crowds in authentic 1889 Belle Époque fashion, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists wearing elaborate feathered hats and carrying lace parasols, men in three-piece suits and frock coats wearing top hats and bowler hats with handlebar mustaches, warm yellow gaslight contrasting with cold blue-white electric arc lights from the Exposition, foggy morning atmosphere, volumetric lighting through steam and coal smoke, mist rising, green Morris columns, newspaper kiosks, sepia and zinc grey color palette with bottle green accents, impressionist realism style à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud, autochrome photography texture with light film grain and subtle vignetting, industrial revolution atmosphere, historically accurate, cinematic square framing, bustling Belle Époque Paris street scene, Instagram-optimized composition

alternative_prompts.option_1_vertical_tower: Vertical square composition 1:1, Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise dominating the frame from base to top, Belle Époque crowd in foreground on cobblestones, Haussmannian buildings on sides, warm gaslight vs cold electric lights, foggy atmospheric Paris 1889, impressionist realism, autochrome texture, historically accurate fashion and architecture
alternative_prompts.option_2_street_scene: Square 1:1 intimate street scene of Paris 1889, Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise visible in background, focus on Belle Époque elegantly dressed crowd, women with parasols and feathered hats, men in top hats, cobblestone reflections, green Morris columns, gaslight glow, Haussmannian facades, steam atmosphere, impressionist realism, film grain, historically accurate
alternative_prompts.option_3_galerie_entrance: Square 1:1 composition of Galerie des Machines grand entrance, blue-grey steel and glass cathedral, Belle Époque visitors in period fashion entering, Eiffel Tower Rouge Venise visible in distance, warm and cold lighting contrast, cobblestones, steam and fog, sepia tones, impressionist realism, 1889 Paris Exposition Universelle, autochrome photography aesthetic

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements sections, add negative_prompt, set dimensions to 1024x1024 or 1536x1536
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string or alternative_prompts options, DALL-E 3 handles complex descriptions well, specify 1024x1024
usage_notes.for_leonardo: Use main_prompt with style_keywords, set aspect ratio to 1:1, resolution 1024x1024
instagram_tips: Export at minimum 1080x1080px for best quality
Test different composition options (vertical tower vs street scene)
Vintage aesthetic works well for Instagram engagement
Consider adding subtle border or frame for gallery posts

instagram_caption_suggestions: Paris, 1889 🗼 Quand la Tour Eiffel était encore rouge...
Voyage dans le temps : L'Exposition Universelle de 1889 ✨
Belle Époque : Entre tradition et modernité industrielle 🎩
1889 - Paris découvre la Tour Eiffel en Rouge Venise 🏗️
